title: View Cube — faces, edges, and corners for standard views
capture_instructions: Close-up of the View Cube in the bottom-right corner. The cube should be shown from a slight isometric angle so that three faces are visible simultaneously (Top, Front, Right). The face labels should be readable. Optionally use a zoomed/enlarged inset of just the View Cube alongside the full viewport view. Annotations should label each face type (face, edge, corner) with callouts. The Queens Campus top-down view should be visible in the main viewport.
ui_state: Grab/Navigate mode active, top-down view of Queens Campus, View Cube showing labelled faces

annotations.label: Top face — click for top-down plan view
Front face — click for front elevation
Right face — click for right side elevation
